title: ROPE validation check kind: lonlat_density_plot
description: Fields of a check object (besides id/kind) when kind == 'lonlat_density_plot'. Renders a lon/lat density map at each requested altitude for a single time point, forecasting a small window ending at that point. Pure visualization — no scalar score.

time_window_hours.description: Forecast window length ending at time_point, giving the model enough history to make time_point queryable.
